ground_truth.title: Home
ground_truth.main_content: Merced's Local Full Spectrum Doula Since 2020. Merced Doula Services LLC. Specializing in YOUR doula & yoga needs. Merced County Registered Yoga Teacher and Full Spectrum Doula. Ask about our Payment Options Today! Merced County Medi-Cal Contracted Provider. Merced Doula Services is a partnership between Merced Doula Services LLC and Clarissa Hidalgo Yoga. Owned and operated by Clarissa Hernandez-Hidalgo, we strive to provide you with the highest quality of services in both the yoga and doula worlds. Photos by Dawn Kelly Photography and Shawn Overton of Blue Road Photography.
